sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.hits (ClientIP UInt32, EventDate Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ClientIP;
UPDATE test.hits SET ClientIP = IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) WHERE EventDate = '2023-10-01';
SELECT IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) AS ClassC_IP, count() AS total FROM test.hits GROUP BY ClassC_IP ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT ClientIP, EventDate FROM test.hits WHERE IPv4NumToStringClassC(ClientIP) = '192.168.1.xxx';
